title: [Sylinar's Spire, Bed Chamber]
description: Soft light filters through narrow windows, settling across a bedchamber arranged with deliberate care.  Along one wall, a painted mural stretches wide, depicting a grove of surita trees rising from a winter-wrapped mountainside, their pale trunks and dark boughs standing against drifting snow and distant peaks.  A low bed of pale wood rests nearby, dressed in layered textiles of soft blue and silver, while a low hearth sits ready to warm the space when lit.
